author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas Community Week: July 28 - August 2

Star Atlas exists because of our explorers, builders, and dreamers. It's time to celebrate you. 

Community Week starts on July 28! Six days, six events and endless fun.  

Here's what's coming up: 
Kickoff Event,COPA (Star Atlas Guild Competition),Town Hall Pt. 1 (),Team vs Community in our newest update!,Joni Awards (Community Award Ceremony),Community Carnival Raffle (Earn tickets all week and enter to win prizes),
Star Atlas Community Week kicks off
